title: NEXUS Role-Based Access Control Configuration
description: Defines what each role can see and do in the NEXUS system. Applied by the API gateway layer. Person B owns this config.

NEXUS_PRODUCT_MANAGER.description: Internal product managers at the software vendor. See cross-tenant aggregated insights.

NEXUS_SALES.description: Sales team. Can see which clients underuse licensed features to identify upsell opportunities.

NEXUS_COMPLIANCE.description: Compliance officer. Can audit telemetry consent states and data handling logs.

NEXUS_TENANT_ADMIN.description: Admin at a client tenant. Can see ONLY their own tenant's data and control their own telemetry consent.
NEXUS_TENANT_ADMIN.note: data_scope=OWN_TENANT_ONLY is enforced at the query layer by injecting tenant_id filter on every DB/Kafka query. This is NOT just a UI restriction.

NEXUS_SUPER_ADMIN.description: NEXUS platform engineers only. Full access for debugging. All actions are audited.

tenant_isolation.description: NEXUS_TENANT_ADMIN can NEVER access another tenant's data.
tenant_isolation.implementation: Inject 'WHERE tenant_id = :caller_tenant_id' into ALL data queries when role is NEXUS_TENANT_ADMIN. Enforced in the data layer, not just the API layer.

pii_access.description: No role can access raw user_hash values or session_ids via the dashboard.
pii_access.implementation: Strip user_hash and session_id fields in the API serialization layer before any response is sent.
pii_access.violation_action: Strip field silently + audit log warning

raw_event_access.description: No role (including SUPER_ADMIN) can bulk-export raw_events via the API.
raw_event_access.implementation: The /api/v1/raw-events endpoint is disabled. Raw data access requires direct DB access with MFA.

telemetry_consent.description: Per-tenant opt-out control. When a tenant opts out, telemetry collection stops immediately.

states.FULL_OPT_IN: All telemetry collected and synced to cloud.
states.ON_PREM_ONLY: Telemetry collected but InsightPackets NOT synced to cloud. Stays on-prem only.
states.OPT_OUT: Ghost SDK stops buffering. No data collected. On-prem vault is paused.

telemetry_consent.enforcement: On consent change, push new state to Ghost SDK via a signed config packet. SDK must re-check consent on every startup.
